testcase.name: 01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.1 User can sign up with email and complete onboarding
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.2 Onboarding shows progress bar advancing through 3 steps
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.3 Create Trip stage — trip name is editable and Continue advances stepper
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.4 Bucket List — adding 3 destinations and approving advances to Timing
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.5 Timing — heatmap renders and approval advances to Interests
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.6 Interests — answering 10 yes/no questions advances to Health
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.7 No screen shows more than 1 YesNo card requiring a decision simultaneously
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.8 POIs — 8 approved, continue button appears after all are actioned
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.9 Budget meter never exceeds $150/day during the journey
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.10 Economy flight is selected and book button appears
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.11 Full happy-path completes all 14 stages and triggers calendar sync
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.12 Stepper shows 13 completed dots at the sync screen
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.13 Trip summary card on sync screen shows correct budget
01 — Happy Path: Solo Traveler › 1.14 "Restart demo" button returns to step 0
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.1 Organizer can create a group trip and invite 3 members
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.2 Member count badge shows 4 throughout the wizard
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.3 Bucket list voting shows consensus indicator before advancing
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.4 Timing heatmap reflects group compromise (not individual preference)
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.5 Group interests panel shows merged scores from all 4 members
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.6 Health requirements show acknowledgment for all 4 members
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.7 POIs reflect group overlap interests (not individual)
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.8 Availability stage finds an overlap window for all 4 members
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.9 Group budget is set per-person and stays within range for all flights
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.10 Full group flow completes all 14 stages and syncs all 4 calendars
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.11 Sync screen lists all 4 member emails or names in the calendar list
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.12 Itinerary approval is confirmed before advancing to sync screen
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.13 Stepper shows 13 completed dots on the sync screen for group flow
02 — Happy Path: Group Trip › 2.14 Trip summary shows per-person budget and group size
